text:

Patch

Poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.3 amd + i386
11.0 amd + i386
12-current amd + i386 (r307551)

portlint with 3 warnings: patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''. 
I use "make makepatch" and move the files to /file but the same warming. 

make test is fine, too.


Cheers
jochen
